headline: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Launches Enhanced Payments, Is The Stock Fully Valued?
summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) is in focus after U.S. Bank launched Enhanced Payments, a bundled digital solution for small businesses, alongside rising analyst optimism ahead of the upcoming July earnings report. See our latest analysis for U.S. Bancorp. Recent momentum in U.S. Bancorp’s stock has been firm, with a 30 day share price return of 9.86% and a year to date share price return of 15.72%, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 37.67% that reflects optimism around earnings and the...
